message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="carson-gross" color="purple" summary="Step 9 design approved, awaiting route acknowledgment">
CONSENSUS: APPROVED on Step 9 design. I sent my detailed HTMX feedback two messages ago. The critical point: use the existing `POST /inbox/{id}/clarify` endpoint with a new `clarify_type=waiting_for` radio value -- do not create a separate endpoint. Please acknowledge this specific item per our new retro agreement.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Carson is asking me to re-acknowledge his feedback, which I already did in a detailed message. Let me confirm briefly.

input.content: Already acknowledged in my earlier message to you, but to confirm again explicitly: yes, the implementation uses the existing `POST /inbox/{id}/clarify` endpoint with `clarify_type=waiting_for` as a form field value. No separate endpoint was created. Your HTMX guidance was followed exactly.

routing.content: Already acknowledged in my earlier message to you, but to confirm again explicitly: yes, the implementation uses the existing `POST /inbox/{id}/clarify` endpoint with `clarify_type=waiting_for` as a form field value. No separate endpoint was created. Your HTMX guidance was followed exactly.
